mapper.sql: select c.channel_id, c.provider_id, p.provider_name, c.channel_name, c.channel_code, c.base_url, c.api_key, c.api_secret, c.proxy_enabled, c.priority, c.weight, c.timeout_ms, c.max_concurrency, c.rpm_limit, c.tpm_limit, c.is_fallback, c.health_status, c.status, c.remark, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time from ai_c_provider_channel c left join ai_c_provider p on p.provider_id = c.provider_id
mapper.insert: insert into ai_c_provider_channel (provider_id, channel_name, channel_code, base_url, api_key, api_secret, proxy_enabled, priority, weight, timeout_ms, max_concurrency, rpm_limit, tpm_limit, is_fallback, health_status, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{providerId}, #{channelName}, #{channelCode}, #{baseUrl}, #{apiKey}, #{apiSecret}, #{proxyEnabled}, #{priority}, #{weight}, #{timeoutMs}, #{maxConcurrency}, #{rpmLimit}, #{tpmLimit}, #{isFallback}, #{healthStatus}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update ai_c_provider_channel set provider_id = #{providerId}, channel_name = #{channelName}, channel_code = #{channelCode}, base_url = #{baseUrl}, api_key = #{apiKey}, api_secret = #{apiSecret}, proxy_enabled = #{proxyEnabled}, priority = #{priority}, weight = #{weight}, timeout_ms = #{timeoutMs}, max_concurrency = #{maxConcurrency}, rpm_limit = #{rpmLimit}, tpm_limit = #{tpmLimit}, is_fallback = #{isFallback}, health_status = #{healthStatus}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where channel_id = #{channelId}
mapper.delete:
delete from ai_c_provider_channel where channel_id in
#{channelId}
